body: Looks good, Tony. I added one item on the Annual Open prize fund. See you at the Civic Center at 10.

body: Bill, are we on for Saturday at your place, the usual 10 to 1? I will bring the new endgame book.
snippet: Bill, are we on for Saturday at your place, the usual 10 to 1? I will bring the new endgame book.
subject: Saturday chess

body: Of course. Lemonade is ready. I have a Najdorf line I want to show you.
snippet: Of course. Lemonade is ready. I have a Najdorf line I want to show you.
subject: Re: Saturday chess

body: Excellent. I will leave by 9:30. See you then.
snippet: Excellent. I will leave by 9:30. See you then.
subject: Re: Saturday chess

body: Confirming your follow-up with Dr. Owens on November 12 at 2:30 PM. Please bring your glucose logs.

subject: Endocrinology follow-up  -  Dr. Owens

body: Thank you. I will bring the Accu-Chek readings and the current medication list.
snippet: Thank you. I will bring the Accu-Chek readings and the current medication list.
subject: Re: Endocrinology follow-up  -  Dr. Owens

body: Received. We also have your most recent A1C on file for comparison.
snippet: Received. We also have your most recent A1C on file for comparison.
subject: Re: Endocrinology follow-up  -  Dr. Owens

body: Appreciated. I will see you on the 12th.
snippet: Appreciated. I will see you on the 12th.
subject: Re: Endocrinology follow-up  -  Dr. Owens

body: Dad, are you and Mom able to come to Baltimore for Father's Day? The twins are asking.
snippet: Dad, are you and Mom able to come to Baltimore for Father's Day? The twins are asking.
subject: Visit to Baltimore  -  Father's Day

body: We would love to. Eric and Diane are joining as well, so it will be the whole family.
snippet: We would love to. Eric and Diane are joining as well, so it will be the whole family.
subject: Re: Visit to Baltimore  -  Father's Day

body: Wonderful. I will plan lunch for one o'clock. Ground-floor parking is reserved for you.
snippet: Wonderful. I will plan lunch for one o'clock. Ground-floor parking is reserved for you.
subject: Re: Visit to Baltimore  -  Father's Day

body: Thank you, Chris. That is thoughtful. We will leave Silver Spring mid-morning.
snippet: Thank you, Chris. That is thoughtful. We will leave Silver Spring mid-morning.
subject: Re: Visit to Baltimore  -  Father's Day

body: Perfect. See you all on Sunday.
snippet: Perfect. See you all on Sunday.
subject: Re: Visit to Baltimore  -  Father's Day
